scroll_found.title: Research the Cave Kitchen scroll at a Research Pedestal

underground_cook.title: Cook and eat a meal while underground (below Y=0) — food is culture anywhere

subtitle.text: The miners ate first. The rest of the culture was built on top of their table.

description: ▸ The miners were underground for days at a time.
The cave kitchen scroll is a record of how they managed.
└ Mushrooms: grow in darkness, renewable underground
→ Cream of Mushroom Soup (FD — cooking pot)
└ Cave vines + Glow Berries: light + food
└ Alex's Caves biomes: unique food items per biome
└ Farmer's Delight Portable Campfire: place anywhere,
└ Mushrooms replace vegetables for diet group
└ Cave-cooked food has same nutrition as surface food
└ Diet continues even underground — don't neglect it
└ Found in: mine supply crates, cave camp chests,
underground forge loot, deep cave shelters
▸ The scroll ends with a recipe.
'We ate this for three months underground.',
▶ Cook and eat a meal underground [check]
◇ Alex's Caves (Ch08) has unique foods per biome.
The Cave Kitchen scroll previews them.
Magnetic Zone mushrooms are worth finding.
